name: Unit Change - Dollars to Cents
description: Backend changed from dollars (float) to cents (integer) without updating frontend or OpenAPI spec

frontend.usage: const total = data.total; // expects dollars, gets undefined

fields.userImpact: Frontend displays $NaN instead of correct amount. Backend returns totalCents (integer cents) but frontend expects total (float dollars).
Payment status shows 'Unknown' because frontend expects lowercase 'paid' but backend returns uppercase 'PAID'.
